description: GameCastle capability cards describe reusable game-building capabilities. They are the source of truth for what LLM1 may consider and what LLM2 may compile into line-style DSL.

fieldNotes.llm1Hint: Short natural-language hint safe for LLM1. Must not include full DSL examples or template structure.
fieldNotes.provides: Game design abilities this card makes available.
fieldNotes.requires: Objects, variables, behaviors, or events the capability expects or creates.
fieldNotes.dsl: Line-style DSL commands and examples available to LLM2.
